meta.title: Prairie Storm 2019: Hands On Power Grid Incident Response Exercise
meta.description:
Owen Redwood and the team at the Nebraska Applied Research Institute (NARI) put together a four-day, hands on exercise for a utility in the Midwest US. There were about 50 participants, 15 active players, on the two sides of the exercise. 

Owen goes over the TTP's that were part of the exercise, and importantly lessons learned on running a complex exercise like this. For example, taking short breaks at key moments so the other team members can learn what the most advanced person on the team did and why.
